compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect brainstorm enforcement
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and other existing documentation to reflect the new brainstorm enforcement hook and sentinel mechanism.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the EnterPlanMode brainstorm gate, the sentinel file, and the allowlist bypass to work effectively.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md hook architecture section, quick reference table, any other existing docs that reference EnterPlanMode or plan mode workflow
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md references the brainstorm enforcement hook, sentinel mechanism, and allowlist bypass
  ← Satisfies: epic documentation requirement
- When this story is complete, existing documentation accurately reflects the new enforcement behavior
  ← Satisfies: epic documentation requirement

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Documentation updated to reflect brainstorm enforcement
comments.author: Main
